differential_diagnoses: Pernicious anemia with severe B12 deficiency (subacute combined degeneration)
Autoimmune hemolytic anemia (AIHA) with underlying marrow failure
Occult malignancy with bone marrow infiltration
next_steps: Serum vitamin B12, methylmalonic acid, and homocysteine levels
Flow cytometry for PNH (CD55/CD59 expression on blood cells)
Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with cytogenetics and flow cytometry
Serum haptoglobin, reticulocyte count, and LDH monitoring
Anti-intrinsic factor and anti-parietal cell antibodies
Serum vitamin B12, methylmalonic acid, and homocysteine levels
Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with cytogenetics, flow cytometry, and iron stain
Laboratory evaluation for hemolysis: haptoglobin, reticulocyte count, and repeat LDH
Serum ferritin, triglycerides, and soluble CD25 level
Focused social history regarding recreational substance use (specifically nitrous oxide)
